action_set_definitions.name: get_initial_defect_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the initial registered coordinates, machine_id, and reported morphology for a specific defect ID.

defect_id.description: The unique identifier for the defect (e.g., 'FLW-SCAN-202').

action_set_definitions.name: validate_spatial_mapping
action_set_definitions.description: Checks synchronization status and retrieves the precise drift offset for the specified equipment and defect.

defect_id.description: The unique identifier for the defect.

machine_id.description: The ID of the equipment to verify.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_offset_coordinates
action_set_definitions.description: Applies a drift offset to base coordinates to determine exact corrected spatial mapping.

action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry_at_coordinates
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a high-resolution diagnostic scan at specific X,Y coordinates to retrieve depth and morphological details.

machine_id.description: The ID of the diagnostic equipment.

action_set_definitions.name: get_material_traceability_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves material batch records, production events, and chemical analysis (e.g., contaminants) for the defect location.

action_set_definitions.name: query_maintenance_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the calibration status and repair history for a machine.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_safety_protocol_margins
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves safety margin thresholds for the specified protocol.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_final_disposition
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final root cause and maintenance decision.

state_description.production_line_status: The current operational mode of the line (e.g., 'Normal', 'Degraded', 'Emergency_Stop').
state_description.active_defects: A list of currently detected quality issues requiring RCA.
state_description.machine_states: Internal telemetry and status for each machine in the process (e.g., temperature, pressure).
state_description.material_traceability: Metadata regarding the current batch of raw materials (Batch ID, Supplier, Quality Certificates).
state_description.maintenance_logs: Historical record of repairs and calibrations performed on the equipment.
state_description.hidden_root_cause: The ground-truth cause of the defect, used internally to determine action results but never revealed to the Agent.

active_defects.preliminary_obs: Subsurface attenuation noted in automated sweep.

maintenance_logs.action: Manual override of X-axis home position to clear path; production resumed without full homing sequence to meet Takt time.

maintenance_logs.notes: Defect FLW-SCAN-202 likely occurred during this shift.

task_initial_state.hidden_root_cause: The 'Manual override' in the maintenance log created a +12.5mm offset in the X-axis coordinate system. The defect is physically located at X:155.0, not X:142.5. If the agent inspects the reported X:142.5 without correcting the encoder offset, they will find 'No Defect' (Clear Laminate). The actual cause is a 'Teflon Backing Strip' inadvertently trapped at Ply 12 during the disrupted shift.
